arts.ttl: Vitor Pereira reveals Matheus Cunha Wolves exit conversations amid Arsenal transfer links
arts.sum: Cunha has yet to sign a new deal with Wolves, but Pereira says he has had talks with the Brazilian about his behaviour and understands the forward has no plans to leave the club. He wants to help the team, be with us, to be with us tomorrow to try and win the game.

arts.ttl: Former Man Utd boss has already paid Arsenal target Benjamin Sesko the biggest compliment
arts.sum: Despite Rangnick's advice, United didn't act on his suggestions, leading Sesko to sign with RB Leipzig in a £55 million move, a transfer that was disclosed a year before its realization in the summer of 2023. Arsenal transfer target Benjamin Sesko could have been showcasing his talents at Manchester United if things had taken a different turn, as he was on the list of recommendations from Ralf Rangnick during his brief tenure as interim manager at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends fresh Arsenal transfer plea to Josh Kroenke as harsh January reality clear
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has provided a fresh update on Arsenal's ongoing search to bring in new signings during the January transfer window. However, Arteta's response to the possibility of no one coming in was telling of the January market state and the club's current progress in making new signings.

Three goals were conceded in each of those defeats, and while FA Cup progress was made at Bristol City earlier this month, they have lost 11 of their last 15 home Premier League games, keeping just two clean sheets in that time. We have won eight of our 10 Premier League away games against Wolves, our highest win rate against any side we’ve faced more than five times on the road in the competition.

arts.ttl: Club not interested in Wolves enquiry for player – Tottenham’s preferential option sees transfer demands rise
arts.sum: Real Betis will not contemplate a deal for Johnny Cardoso this month, with Tottenham retaining an option on him and Wolverhampton Wanderers asking making enquiries. That’s according to Marca, who say the Spanish side are not considering selling Cardoso despite the Premier League interest in him.
